hooks.command: echo ''; echo '=== SESSION END ==='; echo 'Before you close:'; echo '  1. Run /context-save to persist state'; echo '  2. Update status file in memory'; echo '  3. Append to session log in Obsidian'; echo 'Next session: run /preload first.'; echo '=================='

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);cmd=d.get('command','');print('[hook] Run /review --diff before pushing.') if 'git commit' in cmd and '--amend' not in cmd else None" 2>/dev/null || true

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);m=d.get('model','');t='haiku' if 'haiku' in m else ('sonnet' if 'sonnet' in m else 'opus' if 'opus' in m else 'unknown');print(f'[route-model] Agent dispatched: {t}') if m else None" 2>/dev/null || true

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd=d.get('command','')

# Danger detection
danger=['rm -rf','git reset --hard','git push --force','git push -f','drop table','truncate table','DELETE FROM','format c:','mkfs']
for x in danger:
    if x.lower() in cmd.lower():
        print(f'[DANGER] Contains \"{x}\" -- confirm this is intentional.')

# Branch protection
if re.search(r'git push.*\b(main|master)\b', cmd):
    print('[BRANCH-GUARD] Pushing to main/master. Are you sure?')

# Secrets detection
secret_patterns=[r'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}',r'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}',r'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}',r'AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}']
for pat in secret_patterns:
    if re.search(pat, cmd):
        print('[SECRETS-GUARD] Possible API key/token in command -- check before running.')
        break
" 2>/dev/null || true

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
content=d.get('content','')
path=d.get('file_path','')

# Detect secrets in file content
secret_patterns=[r'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}',r'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}',r'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}',r'AIza[0-9A-Za-z_-]{35}',r'-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY-----']
for pat in secret_patterns:
    if re.search(pat, content):
        print(f'[SECRETS-GUARD] Possible secret in file being written to {path} -- verify this is not a real credential.')
        break
" 2>/dev/null || true
